_metadata.purpose: Weekend May 1-3 2026 sports slate for forecasting + accumulator analysis.
_metadata.notes: NBA + NHL series Game 6/7 + EPL marquee fixtures. EPL games carry vegas_draw_moneyline (3-way market) — accumulator analyzer must respect this.

games.series_context: Eastern Conference 1st Round, Game 6. Magic lead series 3-2. Pistons facing elimination at home.
games.notes: Pistons home for elimination G6. Books slightly favor home/elimination dynamic over series-leader form.

games.series_context: Eastern Conference 1st Round, Game 6. Cavaliers lead series 3-2. Raptors facing elimination at home.
games.notes: Cavs heavy favorites on the road to clinch.

games.series_context: Western Conference 1st Round, Game 6. Lakers lead series 3-2. Rockets facing elimination at home after winning G5 99-93 in LA.
games.notes: Rockets home, last game G5 won by HOU on the road. Bot's prior pick (HOU at +150) hit Wed.

games.series_context: Eastern Conference 1st Round, Game 7. Series tied 3-3. Winner advances to Round 2.
games.notes: Heavy Celtics favorites at home in G7. PHI 49-40 RS, BOS 59-29 RS.

games.series_context: Eastern 1st Round, Game 6. Canadiens lead series 3-2 after winning G5 3-2 on the road. Habs need 1 win at home to clinch.
games.notes: Books favor TBL slightly despite series deficit — talent gap. MTL home + crowd + clinching motivation.

games.series_context: Eastern 1st Round, Game 6. Sabres lead series 3-2. Bruins won G5 in OT on Pastrnak goal — facing elimination at home.
games.notes: Pick'em line. BUF division-best 50-23 RS; BOS 4th in Atlantic but G5 OT win swung momentum.

games.series_context: Western 1st Round, Game 6. Vegas leads 3-2 after winning G5 5-4. Mammoth facing elimination at home — just lost two consecutive OT games.
games.notes: VGK is 3rd-period team this postseason. UTA reeling from 2x OT losses.

games.series_context: Premier League matchday. Arsenal in title chase + UCL semi 2nd leg vs Atletico mid-week. Fulham mid-table.
games.notes: 3-way market. Arsenal heavy favorite but UCL fixture congestion + rotation risk; book proxy from oddsshark computer pick.

games.series_context: Premier League matchday. North-west marquee derby at Old Trafford.
games.notes: 3-way market. Books install MUN as slight home favorite (+130) over LIV (+175) with draw +290. Tight 3-way.
